items.title: Twisha Sharma death case: husband Samarth Singh brought to Bhopal, police to seek remand
items.summary: Bhopal Commissioner said local police would continue the investigation until the central agency formally takes over the case; yet to be reached for recording my statement, says...

items.title: Tens of thousands rally in Serbia for antigovernment demonstrations
items.summary: The student-led movement, which began after the Novi Sad disaster in November 2024, is pushing for early elections.

items.title: France Bans Israeli Minister Over Treatment of Detained Flotilla Activists
items.summary: Itamar Ben-Gvir, the Israeli national security minister, has long drawn criticism for his hard-line statements and harsh policies against Palestinian prisoners.
